name: Patient 8
history: Past traumatic sexual assault by partner Ivan. Ongoing relationship difficulties with trust and intimacy issues.
intermediate_belief: I'm not safe in intimate relationships.
intermediate_belief_depression: My trauma has permanently damaged my ability to experience intimacy.
coping_strategies: Monitoring partner's behavior, assessing trustworthiness gradually.
situation: Physical intimacy is resuming in the relationship.
auto_thought: What if he hurts me again? Can I really trust him?
behavior: Engage in physical intimacy while monitoring for safety cues.
